_publications._publicationTitle: Acceptance and commitment therapy in youth with neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) and chronic pain and their parents: A pilot study of feasibility and preliminary efficacy.

_contextSnippet: Parent ratings on the PII declined, indicating less pain interference in the patients, from baseline to the 3-month follow-up ( P  = 0.02)
details: Parent ratings of pain interference declined significantly from baseline to 3-month follow-up (P = 0.02) on PII
